introSection: Twister Roller Coaster is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Crealy Adventure Park & Resort in Exeter, Devon, England, UK. It opened on July 19, 2015.
fullText: Twister Roller Coaster is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Crealy Adventure Park & Resort in Exeter, Devon, England, UK. It opened on July 19, 2015.
